## Checklist

- [ ] I added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) — required for any change to `packages/bridge`
      that affects published output. Docs/playground-only changes are exempt.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed
